title: Rules and regulations
doc_html:
§1036.  Rules and regulations

The department may promulgate any rules and regulations necessary to effectuate the purposes of this Chapter.

Acts 1987, No. 225, §2; Acts 2006, No. 676, §3, eff. July 1, 2006.
doc_text:
§1036.  Rules and regulations
The department may promulgate any rules and regulations necessary to effectuate the purposes of this Chapter.
Acts 1987, No. 225, §2; Acts 2006, No. 676, §3, eff. July 1, 2006.
